form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 13 at Canberra in the G3 Black Opal on March 8 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Music Time with 56kg at $11. Before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Canberra Opalpreview on February 20 over 1000m, 0.6 len behind Music Time with 56.5kg at $3.20. Talented gelding capable of overcoming the poor draw.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, eased back early on 7th of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Hellenic Belle carrying 58kg at $26. Better for that experience but tested here.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 8 at Flemington in the G3 Ottawa on March 7 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Medicinal carrying 56kg at $12. Last start held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 0.5 len behind Hellenic Belle with 56kg at $2. Comes here in peak condition and shapes as a leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped on jumping by Cosmic Jinks.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 9th of 11 at Muswellbrook 2yo Hcp on March 8 over 1000m, 7 len behind Drumfire carrying 56kg at $17. Last start 4th of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Hellenic Belle with 55kg at $41. Thereabouts last time but this looks a stiff test.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, ran last of 8 at Rosehill in the G3 Magicnight on March 14 over 1200m, 10 len behind Pembrey carrying 56.5kg at $8.50. Second-up raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.5 len at Muswellbrook Starmaker March 27 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Better Off Alone carrying 56kg at $5.50. Tough Maiden win last start and can go on with it now.

form.formComment: Jumped at a huge quote at debut, came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 11 at Muswellbrook Starmaker on March 27 over 1000m, slow going 4.5 len behind Hellenic Belle carrying 56kg at $81. Finds a tough assignment this time.

form.formComment: Getting off the mark on debut; favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; scored a big 4 len win at Dubbo Boot Prel March 15 over 1100m defeating Big Lon carrying 56kg at $2.30. Slashing debut winner and will prove hard to stop again.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding making debut by Profiteer out of Diapason. Purchased for AUD $ 10,000 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Won a trial over 800m at Kembla Grange on March 5. Following that Was second in a 1000m barrier trial on March 23 at Hawkesbury. Looks a capable type who should be competitive.
